folio.label: 81r
folio.l: Cast vp the curtyn , loke how that it is
And whan æ the knygút , saw verreyly al this
That she so fair was , & so ©ongö ther to
For ioye he hent hire , in hise armes two
His hert bathed , in a batú of blisse
A thousand tymes a rowe , he gan hire kysse
And she obeyed hi~ , in euäy thyngö
That mygút don hi~ plesaunce , or likyngö
And thus they leue , vn to here lyues ende
In ¹fyt ioye , and iúu crist vs sende
Husbondes meke , ©onge and fressú a bedde
And grace to ouä byde hem , that we wedde
And eke I preye iúu , shorte here lyues
That nougút wyl be gouäned , by here wyues
And olde and angry , nygardes of despence
God sende hem sone , verray pestilence
Hic desinit fabula vxäis de Bathe
